title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi, founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, built a regulated financial exchange for real-world event betting after years of regulatory conflict, including suing the government agency overseeing them. The startup achieved millions of customers, billions in trading volume, and a $22 billion valuation by positioning itself as a truth market rather than a casino.
